description: Peanut the Squirrel (PNUT) emerged in 2024 as Solana’s cult-favorite meme mascot, blending adorable squirrel humor. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 PNUT gives PNUT holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, AI contract capability, and staking support, turning PNUT into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Peanut the Squirrel
